title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 514.060 - Recovery of costs in civil actions, by whom
text:
514.060.  Recovery of costs in civil actions, by whom. — In all civil actions, or proceedings of any kind, the party prevailing shall recover his costs against the other party, except in those cases in which a different provision is made by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 1406) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1242; 1919 § 1694; 1909 § 2263
